nodes.label: Release Plan Overview: 48 tasks across 5 phases (M0 spike -> M4 v2), sized and sequenced. Effort scale: S <= 1 dev-day, M <= 3, L <= 7, XL > 7. 'Deps' references task IDs that must land first.
Phase 0 - Foundations & Spikes (M0), wk 1-2: Tech decisions + overlay/hook proofs of concept. Exit criteria: <100 ms overlay POC on Win10/11 incl. ARM64.
nodes.source_location: page 2, Release Plan Overview table & Phase 0 heading

nodes.label: Phase 1 - MVP Ring Engine (M1), wk 3-8: Ring core, triggers, basic actions, folders, basic profiles, basic editor, offline storage, perf targets. Exit criteria: Daily-drivable; all P0s demoable; perf budgets green.
nodes.source_location: page 2-3, Release Plan Overview table & Phase 1 heading

nodes.label: Phase 2 - v1.0 Polish (M2), wk 9-14: Adjustment bars, full editor + onboarding + icons, bundled presets, game mode, installer/signing, diagnostics. Exit criteria: All P0 complete, crash-free >= 99.5% in beta.
nodes.source_location: page 3, Release Plan Overview table & Phase 2 heading

nodes.label: Phase 3 - v1.x Differentiators (M3), wk 15-22: Marking menus, deeper nesting, profile import/export, plugin SDK v1, snippets, AI launcher, accessibility. Exit criteria: P1 complete; community preset sharing live.
nodes.source_location: page 4, Release Plan Overview table & Phase 3 heading

nodes.label: Phase 4 - v2 and Beyond (M4), later: macOS port, plugin SDK v2, dynamic bubbles, gallery, themes, haptics research. No exit criteria specified.
nodes.source_location: page 4, Release Plan Overview table & Phase 4 heading

nodes.label: T0.1 Write engineering design doc: process model (background engine + overlay + editor), config schema v1, IPC choice. Effort M. Deps: none.
T0.2 Framework spike: measure overlay show-latency for native Win32/D2D vs Tauri vs Electron; pick stack. Effort M. Deps: none.
T0.3 Low-level input POC: global mouse+keyboard hooks (WH_MOUSE_LL / WH_KEYBOARD_LL or Raw Input), swallow XBUTTON events, re-inject when unarmed. Effort M. Deps: none.
T0.4 Input injection POC: SendInput for chords, sequences, unicode text; verify against elevated windows (UIPI limits documented). Effort S. Deps: none.
T0.5 Foreground-app detection POC: process name + window title on trigger, incl. UWP apps; measure cost. Effort S. Deps: none.
T0.6 CI setup: build, unit tests, signed nightly artifact; ARM64 build target from day one. Effort M. Deps: T0.2.
T1.1 Background engine service: startup, tray icon, config load/watch, atomic JSON persistence. Effort L. Deps: T0.1.
T1.2 Trigger system: mouse-button + hotkey triggers, arm/disarm, global toggle, event swallowing. Effort L. Deps: T0.3, T1.1.
T1.3 Overlay renderer: pre-warmed topmost window, 8-bubble radial layout at cursor, hover highlight, labels, sizes S/M/L, DPI/multi-monitor clamping. Effort XL. Deps: T0.2.
T1.4 Both activation gestures: click-release and press-hold-release selection. Effort M. Deps: T1.2, T1.3.
T1.5 Action framework + executors: keystroke, keystroke sequence, open app/folder/file/URL, run command, do-nothing. Effort L. Deps: T0.4, T1.1.
T1.6 Input-safety test matrix: drag ops, RDP, VMs, elevated apps, games, multiple mice; fix leaks. Effort M. Deps: T1.2.
T1.7 System actions pack: clipboard, media, volume, screenshot, window management, lock, emoji, clipboard history. Effort L. Deps: T1.5.
T1.8 Multi-Action macro engine with delays + type-text steps. Effort M. Deps: T1.5.
T1.9 Folders: data model, in-ring expansion, back navigation. Effort M. Deps: T1.3.
T1.10 Contextual profiles: General + per-app by process name, profile resolution at trigger time. Effort M. Deps: T0.5, T1.1.
T1.11 Minimal editor v0: profile list, bubble grid, action picker (list-based), rename/icon-from-exe. Effort L. Deps: T1.1.
T1.12 Performance harness: automated trigger->pixel latency measurement; cold-start test after simulated sleep; RAM/CPU budget gate in CI. Effort M. Deps: T1.3.
T1.13 Watchdog + resume-from-sleep hook re-registration + crash recovery. Effort M. Deps: T1.1.
T2.1 Adjustment actions: scroll-wheel-on-hover, click-drag adjustment bar, live numeric value display, volume/brightness/zoom built-ins. Effort L. Deps: T1.3, T1.7.
T2.2 Full editor: drag-and-drop from categorized searchable picker, drag-reorder/remove, folder editing incl. remove-from-folder. Effort XL. Deps: T1.11.
T2.3 Icon system: bundled glyph set, exe icon extraction, PNG/SVG import with validation. Effort M. Deps: T2.2.
T2.4 Onboarding flow + default General profile. Effort M. Deps: T2.2.
T2.5 Game mode + fullscreen detection + per-profile fullscreen policy + trigger hold-time debounce. Effort M. Deps: T1.2, T1.10.
T2.6 Bundled presets: author + verify 15 app preset profiles. Effort L. Deps: T1.10.
T2.7 Opacity/high-contrast setting, open/close animation with reduce-motion. Effort S. Deps: T1.3.
T2.8 Diagnostics page: hook status, latency stats, action log, engine restart. Effort M. Deps: T1.13.
T2.9 Signed installer (MSI/MSIX), silent-install flags, autostart registration, clean uninstall. Effort M. Deps: T0.6.

T2.10 Beta program: crash reporting (opt-in), feedback channel, fix cycle to >= 99.5% crash-free. Effort L. Deps: 'all P0' (all P0-priority work items complete; no specific task IDs given in this document).
T2.11 ARM64 validation pass (rendering bug class) + Win10 21H2 compatibility pass. Effort S. Deps: T2.10.
T3.1 Marking-menu flick selection. Effort M. Deps: T1.4.
T3.2 Configurable bubble count 2-12 + per-profile overrides. Effort M. Deps: T2.2.
T3.3 Nesting to 3 levels. Effort M. Deps: T1.9.
T3.4 Profile import/export file format + UI. Effort M. Deps: T2.2.
T3.5 Plugin SDK v1: manifest schema, loader, auto-profile creation, docs + 2 sample plugins. Effort L. Deps: T2.6.
T3.6 Text snippets, AI launcher with selection/clipboard prompt passing, switch-profile action. Effort M. Deps: T1.5.
T3.7 Macro conditions + Esc-cancels-macro. Effort M. Deps: T1.8.
T3.8 Keystroke-pair generic adjustments + per-action sensitivity. Effort M. Deps: T2.1.
T3.9 Accessibility: keyboard ring navigation, screen-reader labels, high-contrast audit. Effort M. Deps: T2.7.
T3.10 Local config backups + restore; conflict-tool detection warnings. Effort S. Deps: T1.1.
T3.11 Window-title/regex app matching. Effort S. Deps: T1.10.
T4.1 macOS port: NSEvent taps, Accessibility onboarding, notarized DMG (single permission). Effort XL. Deps: M2 (Phase 2 milestone complete).
T4.2 Plugin SDK v2: IPC protocol, sandboxing, permission prompts; Photoshop/OBS reference plugins. Effort XL. Deps: T3.5.
T4.3 Dynamic bubbles: open-windows ring, recent files, clipboard top-8. Effort L. Deps: T3.2.
T4.4 Community gallery: signed static index, in-app browse/install of presets/plugins/icon packs. Effort L. Deps: T3.4, T3.5.
T4.5 Theme engine + theme file format. Effort M. Deps: T2.7.
T4.6 Folder-based sync support + docs. Effort S. Deps: T3.10.
T4.7 Research: Windows 11 Advanced Haptics for compatible mice; HID++ EasySwitch feasibility. Effort M. Deps: none.
T4.8 Localization framework + top-10 languages; layout-aware shortcut handling. Effort L. Deps: T3.9.

edges.source_location: page 3, Phase 2 table, Deps column ('all P0')
